query:
SELECT u.name, u.role, d.nome as departamento, l.name as lider 
FROM users u 
LEFT JOIN departamentos d ON u.departamentoId = d.id 
LEFT JOIN users l ON u.leaderId = l.id 
WHERE u.role = 'gerente' 
ORDER BY u.name 
LIMIT 5;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2kPX7CjhqdMFT8y.671da1035469 --database Uksxtg83ZJDkZPJL3fCmwT --execute SELECT u.name, u.role, d.nome as departamento, l.name as lider

LEFT JOIN departamentos d ON u.departamentoId = d.id 
LEFT JOIN users l ON u.leaderId = l.id

ORDER BY u.name 
LIMIT 5;
